summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Seller Detail Page (/admin/sellers/:id). All features working: Profile tab with Basic Information and Business Details cards, Edit Profile form with pre-filled data, SKUs tab with search/filter/approve/reject/delete actions, Deactivate/Activate toggle, back navigation. Tested on multiple sellers including ones with 0 SKUs (empty state), 3 SKUs (with pending), and 135 SKUs.
passed_tests: Admin login at /admin/login with admin@locofast.com / admin123
Navigate to /admin/sellers - page loads with 9 seller cards
Each seller card has View button with data-testid='view-seller-{id}'
Click View navigates to /admin/sellers/:id
Seller Detail page loads with data-testid='admin-seller-detail-page'
Header shows seller logo/initial, company name, Active/Inactive badge, seller code
Profile tab is default active tab
Profile tab shows Basic Information card (Contact Name, Company Name, Description, Location, Email, Phone, GST Number)
Profile tab shows Business Details card (Established, Monthly Capacity, Employees, Factory Size, Annual Turnover, Certifications, Export Markets)
Profile tab shows Categories card
Profile tab shows Inventory Summary with Total SKUs, Live, Pending, Rejected counts
Edit Profile button opens edit form with pre-filled data
Edit form has all fields: Logo upload, Contact Name, Company Name, Description, City, State, Email, Phone, Categories, Password, Additional Fields
Edit form Cancel button closes form
Edit form Save Changes button present
SKUs tab shows pending count badge when seller has pending SKUs
SKUs tab loads fabric list for seller
SKU search input filters fabrics by name/SKU/code
SKU status filter dropdown has All/Pending/Approved/Rejected options
SKU status filter works - filters fabrics by status
SKU table shows Fabric name, Category, GSM, Availability, Status, Actions columns
Pending SKUs show Approve (checkmark) and Reject (X) action buttons
All SKUs show Delete (trash) action button
Empty state shows 'No SKUs uploaded by this seller yet' when seller has 0 fabrics
Deactivate button toggles seller to inactive (button changes to 'Activate')
Activate button toggles seller to active (button changes to 'Deactivate')
Toast notifications show for activate/deactivate actions
Back arrow navigates back to /admin/sellers
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSellerDetail.js: Well-structured component with proper state management using useState and useCallback hooks
Proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements for testing
SKUs tab lazy loads fabrics only when tab is active (good performance)
Edit form properly pre-fills data from seller object
Status filter and search work client-side on loaded fabrics array

Unused imports in AdminSellerDetail.js: getSellers, getArticles, uploadToCloudinary, uploadVideoToCloudinary, Filter, Plus, ToggleLeft, ToggleRight, MapPin, Building2 - consider removing for cleaner code
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Seller Detail Page fully tested and working. Test URLs: /admin/sellers/532b7c34-2ab7-4e8e-9889-003f115d9a8f (Locofast - 135 SKUs), /admin/sellers/2ed9cb85-d8c6-43b1-9353-0831d3674109 (Verified Co - 0 SKUs), Test Fabrics Co. (3 SKUs with 2 pending). All features working: Profile tab, Edit Profile form, SKUs tab with search/filter/actions, Deactivate/Activate toggle, back navigation.
